metadata.source_title: Cyber ​​security decision and physical resilience: legislation ready for consideration

text: ABN AMRO Editorial. The draft versions of the Cyber Security Decree and the Resilience of Critical Entities Decree (WKE) are now with the House of Representatives. This represents a next step in strengthening the digital and physical security of vital sectors. What's changing? Many more sectors will soon be supervised under NIS2, such as energy, healthcare, transport, finance and digital infrastructure.

metadata.source_title: Cyber ​​security decision and physical resilience: legislation ready for consideration

text: The draft versions of the Cyber Security Decree and the Resilience of Critical Entities Decree (WKE) are now with the House of Representatives. This represents a next step in strengthening the digital and physical security of vital sectors. What's changing? Many more sectors will soon be supervised under NIS2, such as energy, healthcare, transport, finance and digital infrastructure. Organizations will be given stricter obligations in terms of risk assessment, incident reporting and recovery measures.

metadata.source_title: Cyber ​​security decision and physical resilience: legislation ready for consideration

text: This represents a next step in strengthening the digital and physical security of vital sectors. What's changing? Many more sectors will soon be supervised under NIS2, such as energy, healthcare, transport, finance and digital infrastructure. Organizations will be given stricter obligations in terms of risk assessment, incident reporting and recovery measures. Physical threats also under scrutiny.

metadata.source_title: Cyber ​​security decision and physical resilience: legislation ready for consideration

text: What's changing? Many more sectors will soon be supervised under NIS2, such as energy, healthcare, transport, finance and digital infrastructure. Organizations will be given stricter obligations in terms of risk assessment, incident reporting and recovery measures. Physical threats also under scrutiny. The WKE decision obliges vital organizations to protect themselves against physical disasters such as sabotage or natural disasters.

metadata.source_title: Cyber ​​security decision and physical resilience: legislation ready for consideration

Organizations will be given stricter obligations in terms of risk assessment, incident reporting and recovery measures. Physical threats also under scrutiny. The WKE decision obliges vital organizations to protect themselves against physical disasters such as sabotage or natural disasters. Careful risk analyzes and preventive measures are becoming the norm.
